## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or operational result.

## Risk

- [ ] Authentication or authorization
- [ ] Orders, signing, or automation
- [ ] Balances, fees, or financial calculations
- [ ] Database migration or background worker
- [ ] Solana program or vault custody
- [ ] No financial/security boundary changed

## Verification

- [ ] Format
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Production build
- [ ] Integration or contract tests where applicable
- [ ] End-to-end path exercised where applicable

Verification level: static / local runtime / public testnet / blocked externally

Evidence (commands, correlation IDs, or transaction signatures; no secrets):

## Rollback

Describe the safe rollback or forward-repair procedure.
